task_completion.description: Update custom-config.js with the required high-fidelity music settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js being modified to include stereo enabled (true), p2p disabled (false), opusMaxAverageBitrate set to 510000, and enableNoisyMicDetection disabled (false).

task_completion.description: Apply the configuration changes to the Jitsi Meet service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing commands executed in the /home/ga/jitsi/ directory to restart or reload the docker-compose services (e.g., 'docker-compose restart' or 'docker-compose down' followed by 'up').

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration via the browser console at http://localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to http://localhost:8080 (Jitsi Meet interface) with the Developer Tools Console open, displaying the active configuration object or variables being queried to confirm the new settings (specifically showing stereo is enabled).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the verification to /home/ga/music_mode_verification.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command saving the screenshot to /home/ga/music_mode_verification.png (e.g., using 'scrot', 'import', or a similar tool), or a file manager/image viewer confirming the existence of this specific image file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet instance in a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8080 and the page content looks like a genuine Jitsi Meet interface, not a blank page or a local HTML file.

integrity.description: The browser console output reflects the actual loaded configuration, not manually typed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The console shows standard JavaScript object evaluation or Jitsi Meet config object output (e.g., expanding the global config object), rather than a simple 'console.log("stereo: true")' typed by the agent to fake the verification.

integrity.description: The final verification file is a genuine image file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/music_mode_verification.png is created using an actual screenshot tool rather than just touching a file or renaming a text file to .png.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js. The required settings are: stereo audio enabled (config.stereo = true), P2P mode disabled (config.p2p.enabled = false or config.p2p = { enabled: false }), Opus max bitrate set to 510000 bps (config.opusMaxAverageBitrate = 510000), and noisy mic detection disabled (config.enableNoisyMicDetection = false). The docker-compose deployment is at /home/ga/jitsi/. The final screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/music_mode_verification.png.
